name: Spaghetti Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain manicotti shells.
2. Cook beef in oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until brown, stirring to separate meat; drain fat.
3. Stir in onion powder, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in 1 cup of the spaghetti sauce; cool and set aside.
5. Reserve 1/2 cup of the ground beef mixture.
6. Combine remaining beef mixture with cheese in a large bowl. Stuff into manicotti.
7. Arrange in greased 13x9" pan.
8. Combine remaining spaghetti sauce with reserved beef mixture in a small bowl; blend well.
9. Pour over manicotti.
10. Cover with foil.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20-30 minutes, or until hot. Garnish as desired.
